items.title: Café de Flore — Paris
items.summary: Iconic Parisian café on the Boulevard Saint-Germain, frequented by Sartre, de Beauvoir, and Picasso. Famous for its hot chocolate and people-watching. Best visited on a weekday morning to avoid tourist crowds.

items.title: Patagonia — Torres del Paine
items.summary: One of the most dramatic landscapes on Earth, the Torres del Paine national park in Chilean Patagonia offers world-class trekking, glaciers, and wildlife. The W Trek takes 4–5 days and is accessible from November to March. Book huts well in advance.
